scripts.dev: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; RUNOFF_DB=$PWD/data/runoff.db RUNOFF_FILES_DIR=$PWD/data/files RUNOFF_WAREHOUSE_DIR=$PWD/data/warehouses concurrently -n web,worker "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter worker dev"
scripts.backend:dev: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; RUNOFF_DB=$PWD/data/runoff.db RUNOFF_FILES_DIR=$PWD/data/files RUNOFF_WAREHOUSE_DIR=$PWD/data/warehouses uv --directory backend run uvicorn runoff_api.main:app --port 8400
scripts.backend:worker: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; RUNOFF_DB=$PWD/data/runoff.db RUNOFF_FILES_DIR=$PWD/data/files RUNOFF_WAREHOUSE_DIR=$PWD/data/warehouses uv --directory backend run python -m runoff_api.worker
scripts.backend:parity: RUNOFF_PARITY=1 RUNOFF_WAREHOUSE_DIR=$PWD/data/warehouses uv --directory backend run pytest -q -k parity
